transcript: And just tell me everything that's going on. What? Could you just tell me what's going on in this picture? You probably got it first. Jonah, you can also speak out loud what you're saying. Six times. Oh, he pushed it to the side. Yes, I put it for him. What about Steven? Thank you. Jonah made it. You sort of cut up. She has to take it all. That's the big thing to do. Oh, cookie jar, yeah. Is that it? All right.
patient_only_transcript: Oh, cookie jar, yeah. Is that it? All right.
speaker_turn_summary: Examiner: 'And just tell me everything that's going on. What? Could you just tell me what's going on in this picture?'
Examiner: 'Jonah, you can also speak out loud what you're saying.'
Patient: 'Oh, cookie jar, yeah. Is that it? All right.'
Examiner: 'You probably got it first. Jonah made it. You sort of cut up. She has to take it all. That's the big thing to do.'
